source.query: PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT * WHERE { ?sub ?pred ?obj . } LIMIT 10

PREFIX qb: <http://purl.org/linked-data/cube#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?dataset (COUNT(*) AS ?count) ?label WHERE { GRAPH <https://linked.opendata.swiss/graph/zh/statistics> { ?dataset a qb:DataSet ; rdfs:label ?label . ?observation qb:dataSet ?dataset . } } GROUP BY ?dataset ?label LIMIT 10

PREFIX qb: <http://purl.org/linked-data/cube#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT DISTINCT ?dataset ?label WHERE { GRAPH <https://linked.opendata.swiss/graph/zh/statistics> { ?dataset a qb:DataSet ; rdfs:label ?label . } } LIMIT 10

PREFIX qb: <http://purl.org/linked-data/cube#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> SELECT DISTINCT ?dataset ?label ?description WHERE { GRAPH <https://linked.opendata.swiss/graph/zh/statistics> { ?dataset a qb:DataSet ; rdfs:label ?label ; dct:description ?description . } } LIMIT 10

source.query:
PREFIX dcatap: <http://data.europa.eu/r5r/>
PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>

SELECT ?countryLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?dataset) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?catalogue a dcat:Catalog ;
             dct:spatial ?country ;
             dcat:dataset ?dataset .
  ?country skos:prefLabel ?countryLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?countryLabel) = "en")
  ?dataset dcatap:applicableLegislation <http://data.europa.eu/eli/reg_impl/2023/138/oj> ;
           dcatap:hvdCategory <http://data.europa.eu/bna/c_a9135398> .
}
GROUP BY ?countryLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?count)

source.query:
PREFIX dcatap: <http://data.europa.eu/r5r/>
PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>

SELECT ?categoryLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?dataset) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  VALUES ?catalogue {
    <http://data.europa.eu/88u/catalogue/dati-gov-it>
    <http://data.europa.eu/88u/catalogue/rndt>
  }
  ?catalogue dcat:dataset ?dataset .
  ?dataset dcatap:applicableLegislation <http://data.europa.eu/eli/reg_impl/2023/138/oj> ;
           dcatap:hvdCategory ?category .
  ?category skos:prefLabel ?categoryLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?categoryLabel) = "en")
}
GROUP BY ?categoryLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?count)

source.query:
PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX dcatapit: <http://dati.gov.it/onto/dcatapit#>

SELECT ?hvd_category (COUNT(DISTINCT ?dataset) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?dataset a dcat:Dataset .
  ?dataset <http://data.europa.eu/r5r/applicableLegislation> ?leg .
  FILTER(?leg = <http://data.europa.eu/eli/reg_impl/2023/138/oj>)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?dataset <http://data.europa.eu/r5r/hvdCategory> ?hvd_category .
  }
}
GROUP BY ?hvd_category
ORDER BY DESC(?count)

source.query:
PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT ?dataset ?title
WHERE {
  ?dataset a dcat:Dataset ;
           dct:title ?title .
  FILTER(LANG(?title) = "en")
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?title), "mafia") || CONTAINS(LCASE(?title), "organised crime"))
}
LIMIT 20

PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT ?dataset ?title ?publisher
WHERE {
  ?dataset a dcat:Dataset ;
           dct:title ?title ;
           dct:publisher ?pub .
  ?pub rdfs:label ?publisher .
  FILTER(
    CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?title)), "mafia") ||
    CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?title)), "organised crime") ||
    CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?title)), "organized crime") ||
    CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?title)), "criminalit") ||
    CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?title)), "antimafia")
  )
  FILTER(LANG(?title) IN ("en", "it", ""))
}
LIMIT 20

source.q: mafia OR criminalità organizzata OR antimafia OR beni confiscati
organised crime OR mafia OR anti-corruption criminal networks
mafia OR criminalità organizzata OR antimafia OR beni confiscati

source.query:
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>
PREFIX dcatapit: <http://dati.gov.it/onto/dcatapit#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?identifier ?name WHERE {
  ?org a dcatapit:Agent ;
       dct:identifier ?identifier ;
       foaf:name ?name .
  FILTER(
    CONTAINS(LCASE(?name), "toscana") ||
    CONTAINS(LCASE(?name), "veneto") ||
    CONTAINS(LCASE(?name), "marche") ||
    CONTAINS(LCASE(?name), "economia e delle finanze") ||
    CONTAINS(LCASE(?name), "lombardia") ||
    CONTAINS(LCASE(?name), "milano") ||
    CONTAINS(LCASE(?name), "inps") ||
    CONTAINS(LCASE(?name), "emilia") ||
    CONTAINS(LCASE(?name), "torino") ||
    CONTAINS(LCASE(?name), "rndt") ||
    CONTAINS(LCASE(?name), "geodati")
  )
} ORDER BY ?name LIMIT 200

source.query:
PREFIX dcatap: <http://data.europa.eu/r5r/>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT ?catalog ?title WHERE {
  ?dataset a dcat:Dataset .
  ?dataset dcatap:applicableLegislation ?leg .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?leg), "HVD"))
  ?catalog dcat:dataset ?dataset .
  OPTIONAL { ?catalog dct:title ?title . FILTER(LANG(?title) = "it" || LANG(?title) = "en") }
}
LIMIT 50

source.query:
PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

SELECT (YEAR(?issued) AS ?anno) (MONTH(?issued) AS ?mese) (COUNT(?dataset) AS ?totale)
WHERE {
  ?dataset a dcat:Dataset .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?dataset), "opendata.comune.palermo"))
  ?dataset dct:issued ?issued .
  FILTER(?issued >= "2026-01-01T00:00:00"^^xsd:dateTime)
}
GROUP BY (YEAR(?issued)) (MONTH(?issued))
ORDER BY ?anno ?mese

PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>

SELECT (COUNT(?dataset) AS ?totale_con_issued) 
WHERE {
  ?dataset a dcat:Dataset .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?dataset), "opendata.comune.palermo"))
  ?dataset dct:issued ?issued .
}

PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>

SELECT ?dataset ?orgName
WHERE {
  ?dataset a dcat:Dataset ;
           dct:publisher ?pub .
  ?pub foaf:name ?orgName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?orgName)), "palermo"))
  FILTER(!CONTAINS(STR(?dataset), "opendata.comune.palermo"))
}
LIMIT 5

PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

SELECT (YEAR(?issued) AS ?anno) (MONTH(?issued) AS ?mese) (COUNT(?dataset) AS ?totale)
WHERE {
  ?dataset a dcat:Dataset .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?dataset), "opendata.comune.palermo"))
  ?dataset dct:issued ?issued .
  FILTER(?issued >= "2025-01-01T00:00:00"^^xsd:dateTime)
  FILTER(?issued < "2027-01-01T00:00:00"^^xsd:dateTime)
}
GROUP BY (YEAR(?issued)) (MONTH(?issued))
ORDER BY ?anno ?mese

PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>

SELECT DISTINCT ?pred
WHERE {
  ?dataset a dcat:Dataset .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?dataset), "opendata.comune.palermo"))
  ?dataset ?pred ?o .
}
LIMIT 50

PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>

SELECT ?dataset ?created ?publisher
WHERE {
  ?dataset a dcat:Dataset ;
           dct:publisher ?publisher .
  ?publisher foaf:name ?nome .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?nome)), "palermo"))
}
LIMIT 5

PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

SELECT (YEAR(?created) AS ?anno) (MONTH(?created) AS ?mese) (COUNT(?dataset) AS ?totale)
WHERE {
  ?dataset a dcat:Dataset ;
           dct:publisher ?publisher ;
           dct:issued ?created .
  ?publisher foaf:name ?nome .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?nome)), "palermo"))
  FILTER(?created >= "2025-01-01"^^xsd:date)
}
GROUP BY (YEAR(?created)) (MONTH(?created))
ORDER BY ?anno ?mese

source.query:
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>

SELECT ?dataset ?title WHERE {
  ?agent dct:identifier "00514490010" .
  ?dataset ?role ?agent .
  ?dataset dct:title ?title .
  FILTER(LANG(?title) = "it")
}

PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>
SELECT ?id ?name WHERE {
  ?s a foaf:Agent .
  ?s dct:identifier ?id .
  ?s foaf:name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(str(?name)), "comune di torino"))
}

source.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Edificio", "Indirizzo", "lat", "lon", COUNT(*) as secciones FROM "b5b68b5c-2ba0-4327-b7cd-3e1b3c4d93c2" WHERE "lat" > 38.18 AND "lat" < 38.20 AND "lon" > 15.54 AND "lon" < 15.57 GROUP

SELECT "Edificio", COUNT(*) as num_secciones, MIN("lat") as lat, MIN("lon") as lon FROM "b5b68b5c-2ba0-4327-b7cd-3e1b3c4d93c2" WHERE "lat" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY "Edificio" ORDER BY num_secciones DESC L

source.query:
PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX edp: <https://europeandataportal.eu/voc#>

SELECT ?harvestEndpoint ?datasetURI ?title
WHERE {
  <http://data.europa.eu/88u/catalogue/data-gov-gr> edp:harvestEndpoint ?harvestEndpoint .
  <http://data.europa.eu/88u/catalogue/data-gov-gr> dcat:dataset ?datasetURI .
  ?datasetURI dcterms:title ?title .
  FILTER(LANG(?title) = "en" || LANG(?title) = "el" || LANG(?title) = "")
}
LIMIT 5

PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>

SELECT ?p (COUNT(?p) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  <http://data.europa.eu/88u/catalogue/data-gov-gr> ?p ?o .
}
GROUP BY ?p
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 30

PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>

SELECT ?s ?title
WHERE {
  ?s dcat:record ?r .
  <http://data.europa.eu/88u/catalogue/data-gov-gr> dcat:record ?r .
  ?r foaf:primaryTopic ?s .
  ?s dcterms:title ?title .
  FILTER(LANG(?title) = "en" || LANG(?title) = "")
}
LIMIT 10

source.query:
SELECT ?dataset ?title ?downloadURL WHERE {
  ?dataset dcat:theme <http://publications.europa.eu/resource/authority/data-theme/CLIMA> .
  ?dataset dct:title ?title .
  ?dataset dcat:distribution ?distribution .
  ?distribution dcat:accessURL ?downloadURL .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?title), "jrc"))
} LIMIT 10

SELECT "Edificio", COUNT(*) as num_secciones, MIN("lat") as lat, MIN("lon") as lon FROM "b5b68b5c-2ba0-4327-b7cd-3e1b3c4d93c2" WHERE "lat" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY "Edificio" ORDER BY num_secciones DESC L

source.query:
PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?dataset) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  VALUES ?kw {
    "violence"@en
    "violence"@fr
    "violenza"@it
    "violencia"@es
    "violência"@pt
    "Gewalt"@de
    "violence"@nl
    "domestic violence"@en
    "gender-based violence"@en
    "violence against women"@en
    "femicide"@en
    "femicidio"@it
    "violenza domestica"@it
    "violencia de género"@es
    "violenza di genere"@it
    "Violence"@de
    "Gewalt gegen Frauen"@de
    "violence familiale"@fr
    "violences faites aux femmes"@fr
    "violence conjugale"@fr
    "violência doméstica"@pt
    "violência contra as mulheres"@pt
  }
  ?dataset a dcat:Dataset ;
           dcat:keyword ?kw .
}

PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>

SELECT ?kw (COUNT(DISTINCT ?dataset) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  VALUES ?kw {
    "violence"@en
    "violence"@fr
    "violenza"@it
    "violencia"@es
    "violência"@pt
    "Gewalt"@de
    "violence"@nl
    "domestic violence"@en
    "gender-based violence"@en
    "violence against women"@en
    "femicide"@en
    "femicidio"@it
    "violenza domestica"@it
    "violencia de género"@es
    "violenza di genere"@it
    "Violence"@de
    "Gewalt gegen Frauen"@de
    "violence familiale"@fr
    "violences faites aux femmes"@fr
    "violence conjugale"@fr
    "violência doméstica"@pt
    "violência contra as mulheres"@pt
  }
  ?dataset a dcat:Dataset ;
           dcat:keyword ?kw .
}
GROUP BY ?kw
ORDER BY DESC(?count)

PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>

SELECT DISTINCT ?theme (COUNT(?dataset) AS ?n)
WHERE {
  ?dataset a dcat:Dataset ;
           dcat:theme ?theme .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?theme), "eurovoc"))
}
GROUP BY ?theme
ORDER BY DESC(?n)
LIMIT 20

PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?concept ?label
WHERE {
  ?concept a skos:Concept ;
           skos:prefLabel ?label .
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = "en")
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?label)), "violence"))
}
LIMIT 20

source.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Edificio", "Indirizzo", "lat", "lon", COUNT(*) as secciones FROM "b5b68b5c-2ba0-4327-b7cd-3e1b3c4d93c2" WHERE "lat" > 38.18 AND "lat" < 38.20 AND "lon" > 15.54 AND "lon" < 15.57 GROUP

SELECT "Edificio", COUNT(*) as num_secciones, MIN("lat") as lat, MIN("lon") as lon FROM "b5b68b5c-2ba0-4327-b7cd-3e1b3c4d93c2" WHERE "lat" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY "Edificio" ORDER BY num_secciones DESC L
SELECT "Sezione", "Edificio", "Indirizzo", "lat", "lon" FROM "b5b68b5c-2ba0-4327-b7cd-3e1b3c4d93c2" WHERE "lat" IS NOT NULL ORDER BY "Sezione" LIMIT 15
SELECT anno, COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(CASE WHEN lat != '' AND lat IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as con_coordenadas FROM "6099ee00-c4e6-488e-b548-cda7a9c662c9" GROUP BY anno ORDER BY anno

source.query:
PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT ?title ?endpointURL
WHERE {
  ?service a dcat:DataService .
  ?service dct:title ?title .
  ?service dcat:endpointURL ?endpointURL .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/api") || CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/rest") || CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/v1") || CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/v2") || CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/v3"))
  FILTER(!CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "ldpgis.it"))
  FILTER(!CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/wms") && !CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/wfs"))
}
ORDER BY ?title
LIMIT 50

PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>

SELECT DISTINCT ?title ?endpointURL ?publisherName
WHERE {
  ?service a dcat:DataService .
  ?service dct:title ?title .
  ?service dcat:endpointURL ?endpointURL .
  OPTIONAL { ?service dct:publisher ?publisher . ?publisher foaf:name ?publisherName . }
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/api") || CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/rest") || CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/v1") || CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/v2"))
  FILTER(!CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/wms") && !CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/wfs"))
}
ORDER BY ?title
LIMIT 30

source.q: geospatial OR geographic OR GeoJSON OR shapefile OR coordinate OR mappa

source.query:
PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX dcat2: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>

SELECT ?endpointType (COUNT(DISTINCT ?service) AS ?numServices)
WHERE {
  ?service a dcat:DataService .
  ?service dcat:endpointURL ?endpointURL .
  BIND(
    IF(CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/wms"), "WMS",
    IF(CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/wfs"), "WFS",
    IF(CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/wcs"), "WCS",
    IF(CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "sparql"), "SPARQL",
    IF(CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/api"), "REST API",
    "Altro"))))) AS ?endpointType)
}
GROUP BY ?endpointType
ORDER BY DESC(?numServices)

PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?service) AS ?numServices) (COUNT(DISTINCT ?endpointURL) AS ?numEndpoints) (COUNT(DISTINCT ?title) AS ?numTitlesDistinct)
WHERE {
  ?service a dcat:DataService .
  ?service dct:title ?title .
  ?service dcat:endpointURL ?endpointURL .
}

PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>

SELECT DISTINCT ?title ?endpointURL
WHERE {
  ?service a dcat:DataService .
  ?service dct:title ?title .
  ?service dcat:endpointURL ?endpointURL .
}
ORDER BY ?title
LIMIT 100

PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?rightsholderName) AS ?numComuni)
WHERE {
  ?dataset dct:rightsHolder ?rightsholder .
  ?rightsholder foaf:name ?rightsholderName .
  FILTER (STRSTARTS(?rightsholderName, "Comune di") || STRSTARTS(?rightsholderName, "Città di"))
}

PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>

SELECT ?rightsholderName (COUNT(DISTINCT ?dataset) AS ?numDataset)
WHERE {
  ?dataset dct:rightsHolder ?rightsholder .
  ?rightsholder foaf:name ?rightsholderName .
  FILTER (STRSTARTS(?rightsholderName, "Comune di") || STRSTARTS(?rightsholderName, "Città di"))
}
GROUP BY ?rightsholderName
ORDER BY DESC(?numDataset)
LIMIT 50

PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>

SELECT ?rightsholderName (COUNT(DISTINCT ?dataset) AS ?numDataset)
WHERE {
  ?dataset dct:rightsHolder ?rightsholder .
  ?rightsholder foaf:name ?rightsholderName .
}
GROUP BY ?rightsholderName
ORDER BY DESC(?numDataset)
LIMIT 20

PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?rightsholderName) AS ?numComuni)
WHERE {
  ?dataset dct:rightsHolder ?rightsholder .
  ?rightsholder foaf:name ?rightsholderName .
}
